hive-formatter.command.format.title: Format SQL
hive-formatter.config.displayLanguage.ma: Plugin display language. `auto` follows VSCode, `zh` forces Chinese, `en` forces English.
hive-formatter.config.dialect.markdownDe: Select the SQL dialect to use. It is strongly recommended to select one, otherwise errors may occur.
Ignore user and workspace `tabSize` and `insertSpaces` settings (use `#Hive-Formatter.tabSizeOverride#` and `#Hive-Formatter.insertSpacesOverride#` instead)?
hive-formatter.config.tabSizeOverride.ma: When `#Hive-Formatter.ignoreTabSettings#` is active, override the `tabSize` setting.
hive-formatter.config.insertSpacesOverri: When `#Hive-Formatter.ignoreTabSettings#` is active, override the `insertSpaces` setting.
hive-formatter.config.keywordCase.markdo: Format keywords in upper case, lower case, or preserve as-is.
hive-formatter.config.dataTypeCase.markd: Format data types in upper case, lower case, or preserve as-is.
hive-formatter.config.functionCase.markd: Format function names in upper case, lower case, or preserve as-is.
hive-formatter.config.identifierCase.mar: Format identifiers in upper case, lower case, or preserve as-is.
hive-formatter.config.indentStyle.markdo: Switch between standard keyword positioning and preserving centered column layout.
hive-formatter.config.indentStyle.enumDe: Standard SQL formatting with cascading indentation
hive-formatter.config.logicalOperatorNew: Whether to place newlines before or after AND/OR operators.
hive-formatter.config.expressionWidth.ma: Maximum character width within parentheses before splitting expressions into multiple lines.
hive-formatter.config.linesBetweenQuerie: Number of blank lines to place between each query/statement.
hive-formatter.config.denseOperators.mar: Whether to remove spaces around operators such as + or >=.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeSemic: Whether to place the semicolon on its own line or keep it on the previous line.
hive-formatter.config.commaPosition.mark: Comma placement: at the beginning or end of the line.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterSelect: Whether to insert a newline after the SELECT keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterFrom.m: Whether to insert a newline after the FROM keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeWhere: Whether to insert a newline before the WHERE keyword.
Whether to insert a newline after the WHERE keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeOrder: Whether to insert a newline before the ORDER BY keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeGroup: Whether to insert a newline before the GROUP BY keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeHavin: Whether to insert a newline before the HAVING keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeLimit: Whether to insert a newline before the LIMIT keyword.
hive-formatter.config.reservedKeywordCas: Casing for reserved keywords (SELECT, FROM, WHERE, etc.).
hive-formatter.config.builtinFunctionCas: Casing for built-in functions (COUNT, SUM, MAX, etc.).
Whether to insert a newline before the JOIN keyword.
Whether to force a newline after commas.
hive-formatter.config.breakAfterSelectIt: Whether to break after each SELECT item.
hive-formatter.config.breakAfterFromItem: Whether to break after each FROM item.
hive-formatter.config.spaceBeforeComma.m: Whether to add a space before commas.
hive-formatter.config.spaceInsideParenth: Whether to add spaces inside parentheses.
hive-formatter.config.semicolonAtEnd.mar: Whether to add a semicolon at the end of statements.
hive-formatter.config.paramTypes.markdow: Specify the types of parameter placeholders to support.
hive-formatter.config.enableEnhancedChec: Whether to enable enhanced syntax checking.
hive-formatter.config.enableLinter.markd: Whether to enable the SQL Lint feature.
Whether to enable the outline view.
hive-formatter.config.enableStatusBar.ma: Whether to enable the status bar feature.
hive-formatter.config.enableParameterHig: Whether to enable parameter highlighting and replacement.
hive-formatter.config.enableHover.markdo: Enable/disable SQL hover tooltips (function signatures, keyword descriptions, parameter references).
hive-formatter.config.enableNavigation.m: Enable/disable code navigation (go to definition, find references, rename symbol, breadcrumbs).
hive-formatter.config.completion.keyword: Whether to include keywords in the completion list.
hive-formatter.config.completion.functio: Whether to include functions in the completion list.
hive-formatter.config.completion.snippet: Whether to include code snippets in the completion list (VSCode already provides snippets natively via contributes.snippets, so this is disabled by default to avoid duplicates).
hive-formatter.config.completion.identif: Whether to suggest table names and column names.
hive-formatter.config.enableSmartComment: Whether to enable SQL-aware smart comment toggling (falls back to VSCode default behavior when disabled).
hive-formatter.config.headerAuthor.markd: Author name in file header comment (leaves placeholder empty for input when blank).
hive-formatter.config.headerModifier.mar: Modifier name in file header comment (falls back to headerAuthor value when blank).
hive-formatter.config.completion.comment: Whether to include comment template snippets in the completion list.
hive-formatter.config.lint.missing_query: Configure the `missing_query_comment` rule (complex queries missing explanatory comments).
Minimum number of query lines to trigger missing_query_comment.
Minimum number of JOINs to trigger missing_query_comment.
Minimum number of subqueries to trigger missing_query_comment.
hive-formatter.config.lint.missing_colum: Configure the `missing_column_comment` rule (DDL column definitions missing COMMENT).
Whether to aggregate multiple missing COMMENT columns within the same DDL into a single diagnostic.
Whether EXTERNAL TABLE is exempt from the missing_column_comment check.
hive-formatter.config.lint.commented_out: Configure the `commented_out_code` rule (suspected large blocks of commented-out code).
Minimum number of commented-out code lines to trigger the rule.
hive-formatter.config.lint.expired_todo_: Grace period (in days) before TODO markers are considered expired.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterGroupB: Whether to break the field list after GROUP BY onto a new line.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterHaving: Whether to break the condition expression after HAVING onto a new line.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterOrderB: Whether to break the sort column list after ORDER BY onto a new line.
Whether to break the number after LIMIT onto a new line.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterJoin.m: Whether to break the table name/subquery after JOIN onto a new line.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeSetOp: Whether to insert a newline before UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterSetOpe: Whether to insert a newline after set operation keywords.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeOn.ma: Whether to insert a newline before the ON keyword in JOIN ... ON.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeUsing: Whether to insert a newline before the USING keyword in JOIN ... USING.
Whether to insert a newline before the WITH keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterWith.m: Whether to insert a newline after the WITH keyword (before the first CTE name).
hive-formatter.config.indentCteBody.mark: Whether to indent the CTE subquery body one level relative to AS (.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBetweenCtes: Whether to insert a blank line between multiple CTEs.
hive-formatter.config.cteCommaPosition.m: Whether commas between CTE definitions go at the beginning or end of the line.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterOver.m: Whether to insert a newline after OVER(.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeParti: Whether to insert a newline before PARTITION BY.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterPartit: Whether to insert a newline after PARTITION BY.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeOrder: Whether to insert a newline before ORDER BY in window functions.
hive-formatter.config.indentJoinConditio: Whether to indent JOIN ON conditions one level relative to JOIN.
hive-formatter.config.alignOnClauses.mar: Whether to align multiple AND/OR condition keywords within ON clauses.
hive-formatter.config.alignInsertColumns: Whether to align INSERT column list with VALUES value list.
hive-formatter.config.alignInsertValuesG: Whether to align values across multiple VALUES groups.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterInsert: Whether to insert a newline after INSERT INTO.
Whether to insert a newline after the closing parenthesis of column list, before VALUES.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBetweenValu: Whether to insert a newline between multiple VALUES groups.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterCase.m: Whether to insert a newline after the CASE keyword.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterWhen.m: Whether to insert a newline after the WHEN condition expression.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterThen.m: Whether to insert a newline after the THEN result expression.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterElse.m: Whether to insert a newline after the ELSE result expression.
hive-formatter.config.indentWhen.markdow: Whether to indent the WHEN keyword one level relative to CASE.
hive-formatter.config.indentThen.markdow: Whether to indent the THEN keyword one level relative to WHEN.
hive-formatter.config.newlineAfterIn.mar: Whether to insert a newline after IN (.
hive-formatter.config.maxItemsInlineList: Force a line break when the number of items in an IN/VALUES list exceeds this threshold.
hive-formatter.config.subqueryParenStyle: Whether the opening parenthesis of a subquery stays on the same line as the content.
hive-formatter.config.commentPosition.ma: Placement strategy for inline comments after formatting.
hive-formatter.config.blankLinesBeforeSe: Number of blank lines to insert before UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT.
hive-formatter.config.blankLinesAfterSet: Number of blank lines to insert after UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT.
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeLater: Whether to insert a newline before LATERAL VIEW (Hive dialect).
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeDistr: Whether to insert a newline before DISTRIBUTE BY (Hive dialect).
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeClust: Whether to insert a newline before CLUSTER BY (Hive dialect).
hive-formatter.config.newlineBeforeSortB: Whether to insert a newline before SORT BY (Hive dialect).
